args.command: mkdir -p /workspace/investment-memo && cd /workspace/investment-memo && git init
mkdir -p /workspace/investment-memo/{memo,model,raw/{filings,transcripts,other},extracted,analysis,research/{notes,questions,dead-ends},decisions}

cd /workspace/investment-memo && cat > /workspace/investment-memo/tool-log.md << 'EOF'
# Tool Log

| # | Tool | Justification |
|---|------|---------------|
| 1 | bash: git init | Initialize git repository for the investment memo project |
| 2 | bash: mkdir -p | Create required directory structure per specification |
| 3 | bash: pip install | Install Python dependencies for data fetching and analysis |
EOF
pip install yfinance requests beautifulsoup4 openpyxl pandas numpy 2>&1 | tail -5

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import yfinance as yf
ticker = yf.Ticker("S")
info = ticker.info
print(f"Company: {info.get('shortName', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Market Cap: {info.get('marketCap', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Sector: {info.get('sector', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Industry: {info.get('industry', 'N/A')}")
PYEOF
cd /workspace/investment-memo && git add -A && git commit -m "Initialize repo structure per specification"

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import json
import time
import hashlib
import os

# SentinelOne CIK is 1899088
CIK = "0001899088"
BASE = "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK" + CIK + ".json"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0 (contact: analyst@example.com)"
}

resp = requests.get(BASE, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

filings = data.get("filings", {}).get("recent", {})
print("Filing types available:", list(filings.keys())[:10])
print("Total recent filings:", len(filings.get("accessionNumbers", [])))

# Get all accession numbers
accessions = filings.get("accessionNumbers", [])
filing_types = filings.get("filingTypes", [])
filings_dates = filings.get("filingDates", [])

for i, (acc, ftype, fdate) in enumerate(zip(accessions, filing_types, filings_dates)):
    print(f"{i+1}. {fdate} - {ftype} - {acc}")

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import json

CIK = "0001899088"
BASE = "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK" + CIK + ".json"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0 (contact: analyst@example.com)"
}

resp = requests.get(BASE, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

# Print top-level keys
print("Top-level keys:", list(data.keys()))
print()

# Print filings structure
if "filings" in data:
    print("Filings keys:", list(data["filings"].keys()))
    recent = data["filings"].get("recent", {})
    print("Recent keys:", list(recent.keys()))
    if "accessionNumbers" in recent:
        print("Number of accessions:", len(recent["accessionNumbers"]))
        print("First 5:", recent["accessionNumbers"][:5])
    if "filingTypes" in recent:
        print("Filing types:", recent["filingTypes"][:10])
    if "filingDates" in recent:
        print("Filing dates:", recent["filingDates"][:10])

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import json

CIK = "0001899088"
BASE = "https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK" + CIK + ".json"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0 (contact: analyst@example.com)"
}

resp = requests.get(BASE, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

recent = data["filings"]["recent"]
n = len(recent["accessionNumber"])
print(f"Total recent filings: {n}")

for i in range(min(n, 30)):
    print(f"{i+1}. {recent['filingDate'][i]} | {recent['form'][i]:10s} | {recent['primaryDocument'][i]} | {recent['fiscalYearEnd'][i] if 'fiscalYearEnd' in recent else ''}")
PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests

# Try the full filings API
CIK = "0001899088"
url = f"https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK={CIK}&type=10-K&dateb=&owner=include&count=50&search_text=&action=getcompany"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0 (contact: analyst@example.com)"
}

resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
# Look for 10-K links
import re
links = re.findall(r'href="(/Archives/[^"]+\.html)"', resp.text)
for link in links[:20]:
    print(link)

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import re

# Try the new EDGAR full-text search API
CIK = "0001899088"

# Method 1: Try the company filings page
url = f"https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK={CIK}&type=&dateb=&owner=include&count=100&search_text=&action=getcompany"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0)"
}

resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
print(f"Length: {len(resp.text)}")

# Look for accession numbers and links
accessions = re.findall(r'accession_number=["\']?(\d+-\d+-\d+)', resp.text)
print(f"Found {len(accessions)} accession numbers")
for a in accessions[:15]:
    print(a)

# Look for filing type links
forms = re.findall(r'form="(\d+)"', resp.text)
print(f"\nFound {len(forms)} form entries")
for f in forms[:15]:
    print(f)
PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import json

# EDGAR API for company filings
CIK = "0001899088"

# Try the new API endpoint
url = f"https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index?q=cik:{CIK}&type=10-K&limit=50"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0)"
}

resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
if resp.status_code == 200:
    print(resp.text[:2000])
else:
    print(resp.text[:500])

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import json

# Try the company filings API with proper parameters
CIK = "0001899088"

# The LATEST API with different query
url = "https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index"

params = {
    "q": "entity_filter.cik_exact:0001899088 AND root_forms:10-K",
    "size": 50,
    "_source": "root_forms,accession_number,filing_date,report_date,document_name,company_name,cik"
}

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (InvestmentMemoResearch/1.0)"
}

resp = requests.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
if resp.status_code == 200:
    data = resp.json()
    hits = data.get("hits", {}).get("hits", [])
    print(f"Found {len(hits)} 10-K filings")
    for h in hits:
        src = h.get("_source", {})
        print(f"  {src.get('filing_date','')} | {src.get('root_forms','')} | {src.get('document_name','')} | {src.get('cik','')}")
else:
    print(resp.text[:500])
PYEOF

        print(f"  {src.get('filing_date','')} | {src.get('root_forms','')} | {src.get('document_name','')}")
else:
    print(resp.text[:500])

import os

print("Done downloading 10-Q filings")

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import requests
import re
import os
import hashlib
import time

# SentinelOne CIK is 1899088
CIK = "0001899088"
OUTPUT_DIR = "/workspace/investment-memo/raw/filings"

# Try to get the company filings page
headers = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
    "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8",
    "Accept-Language": "en-US,en;q=0.5",
}

# Try the company filings page
url = f"https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK={CIK}&type=&dateb=&owner=include&count=100&search_text=&action=getcompany"

resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f"Status: {resp.status_code}")
print(f"Length: {len(resp.text)}")

# Save the page
os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
with open(f"{OUTPUT_DIR}/company_page.html", "w") as f:
    f.write(resp.text)

# Parse the page for filing links
# Look for accession numbers and filing types
accessions = re.findall(r'accession_number=["\']?(\d+-\d+-\d+)', resp.text)
print(f"Found {len(accessions)} accession numbers")
for a in accessions[:20]:
    print(f"  {a}")

# Look for filing type links
forms = re.findall(r'form="(\d+)"', resp.text)
print(f"\nFound {len(forms)} form entries")
for f in forms[:20]:
    print(f"  {f}")
